pdfTools.title: Free PDF Tools Online

pdfTools.wordToPdfDesc: Convert DOC/DOCX to PDF online free
pdfTools.pdfToWordDesc: Extract text from PDF to editable Word format
pdfTools.mergeDesc: Combine multiple PDF files into one document
pdfTools.splitDesc: Extract specific pages from a PDF file
pdfTools.compressDesc: Reduce PDF file size while preserving quality
pdfTools.rotateDesc: Rotate individual PDF pages to any angle
pdfTools.protectDesc: Add password protection to your PDF documents
pdfTools.unlockDesc: Remove password from protected PDF files
pdfTools.pdfToImagesDesc: Convert each PDF page to a high-quality image
pdfTools.imagesToPdfDesc: Combine multiple images into a single PDF document

mediaTools.title: Free Audio & Video Converter

mediaTools.convertVideoDesc: Change video format between MP4, AVI, MOV, MKV, and more
mediaTools.compressVideoDesc: Reduce video file size for easier sharing
mediaTools.trimVideoDesc: Cut and remove unwanted segments from video files
mediaTools.extractAudioDesc: Extract MP3, WAV, or AAC audio tracks from video files
mediaTools.convertAudioDesc: Convert between MP3, WAV, AAC, FLAC, OGG, and more
mediaTools.trimAudioDesc: Cut audio files and extract your favorite segments
mediaTools.changeResolutionDesc: Resize and scale video to any resolution
mediaTools.createGifDesc: Convert any video segment to an animated GIF
